queries.question: For each greenhouse, provide me the their plant names and types
queries.sql: select greenhouse.name , plant.name , plant.type from Greenhouse_Plant join Plant on Greenhouse_Plant.plant_id = Plant.id join Greenhouse on Greenhouse_Plant.greenhouse_id = Greenhouse.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 ?type WHERE {
  ?greenhouse_plant a :Greenhouse_Plant .
  ?plant a :Plant .
  ?greenhouse_plant p:hasPlant ?plant .
  ?greenhouse a :Greenhouse .
  ?greenhouse_plant p:hasGreenhouse ?greenhouse .
  ?greenhouse p:name ?name .
  ?plant p:name ?name2 .
  ?plant p:type ?type .
}

queries.question: Give me the names of the plants that are common to all greenhouses
queries.sql: SELECT Plant.name  from Greenhouse_Plant join Plant on Greenhouse_Plant.plant_id = Plant.id join Greenhouse on Greenhouse_Plant.greenhouse_id = Greenhouse.id   GROUP BY Greenhouse_Plant.plant_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Greenhouse_Plant.greenhouse_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Greenhouse)

queries.question: Give me the plant type for each greenhouse.
queries.sql: SELECT Plant.type  from Greenhouse_Plant join Plant on Greenhouse_Plant.plant_id = Plant.id join Greenhouse on Greenhouse_Plant.greenhouse_id = Greenhouse.id   GROUP BY Greenhouse_Plant.plant_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Greenhouse_Plant.greenhouse_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Greenhouse)

queries.question: What plant name do we have for every greenhouse?
queries.sql: select greenhouse.name , plant.name from Greenhouse_Plant join Plant on Greenhouse_Plant.plant_id = Plant.id join Greenhouse on Greenhouse_Plant.greenhouse_id = Greenhouse.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?greenhouse_plant a :Greenhouse_Plant .
  ?plant a :Plant .
  ?greenhouse_plant p:hasPlant ?plant .
  ?greenhouse a :Greenhouse .
  ?greenhouse_plant p:hasGreenhouse ?greenhouse .
  ?greenhouse p:name ?name .
  ?plant p:name ?name2 .
}

queries.question: What plant names and types do we have for every greenhouse
queries.sql: SELECT Plant.name, Plant.type  from Greenhouse_Plant join Plant on Greenhouse_Plant.plant_id = Plant.id join Greenhouse on Greenhouse_Plant.greenhouse_id = Greenhouse.id   GROUP BY Greenhouse_Plant.plant_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Greenhouse_Plant.greenhouse_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Greenhouse)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What plant names and types do we have for every greenhouse
What plant name do we have for every greenhouse?
Give me the plant type for each greenhouse.
